name.description: Semantic project atom name, for example Host Readiness.

projectId.description: Program-index project id that owns this atom view.

symbolId.description: Public auditable symbol id connected to the atom graph.

directory.description: Directory where atom view modules should be written.

export.description: Update an index.ts barrel in the atom view directory.

reactivityKey.description: Reactivity key refreshed by the symbol.

baseAtomId.description: Stable id for the generated base atom shell.

derivedAtomId.description: Stable id for the generated derived atom shell.

projectAtomId.description: Stable id for the generated project atom shell.

project.description: Owning Nx project recorded in artifact provenance.

generatorVersion.description: Generator package version recorded in artifact provenance.

generatorRevision.description: Generator source revision recorded in artifact provenance.

openspecChangeId.description: OpenSpec change id recorded in artifact provenance.
